L1.head: interactions between intracellular loops and lipid compositions
L1.claim: 细胞内环与脂质组成的相互作用调节GPCR的构象动态

L1.head: conformational dynamics of GPCRs
L1.tail: ligand binding and downstream signaling pathways
L1.claim: GPCR构象动态影响配体结合和下游信号通路

L1.head: novel lipid-based modulators
L1.claim: 新型脂质调节剂可作为潜在药物靶点

L1.head: potential drug targets
L1.claim: 药物靶点为创新治疗策略奠定基础

L2.head: alterations in lipid composition
L2.claim: 脂质组成变化导致GPCR不同构象状态

L2.head: distinct conformational states of GPCRs

L2.claim: GPCR构象状态与受体效能和特异性变化相关
